news.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails

news.title: Onchain, in court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
news.summary: The Polymarket insider trading case and a retrial of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm are expected to move forward in late 2026 while former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky awaits a response to his motion to vacate his sentence.

news.title: Unchained account drained by hacker

Condolences appreciated. Advice welcome.
